_metadata.notes: First research-data.json! Light scan — durable data only. Full hot content scan runs next Friday (April 3).

fun_facts: Kept a clean sheet in the season opener vs Chicago (1-0 win)
Made key saves in the 7-goal thriller at Dallas
Jonathan Bond.one_liner_sports: The steady hands behind the chaos — Bond has been tested early and often this season.

fun_facts: Captain of the team
Former Celtic FC (Scotland) player
Scored a goal, conceded an own goal, AND got sent off in the same match vs FC Dallas — peak chaos energy
Erik Sviatchenko.tea: The Dallas match was his magnum opus of chaos: scored to make it 3-2 Houston, then conceded an own goal, then got sent off with a second yellow in the 68th minute. The man lived an entire telenovela in 90 minutes.
Erik Sviatchenko.one_liner_sports: Captain and defensive leader — when he's not getting red cards, he's organizing the back line.
Erik Sviatchenko.status_april_4: SUSPENDED — second yellow card vs FC Dallas (Mar 21). Misses Seattle match.

Lucas Halter.one_liner_sports: Brazilian center back signed this offseason.
Lucas Halter.status_april_4: OUT — lower body injury (as of March 21 injury report).

fun_facts: Got a straight red card vs LAFC (fouling Son Heung-Min outside the box in first half stoppage time)
Fined by MLS Disciplinary Committee for failing to leave the field in a timely manner after the red
Antônio Carlos.tea: This man's introduction to the 2026 season was fouling SON HEUNG-MIN and getting sent off for it. The audacity. Also got fined for not leaving the field fast enough after. Drama runs in this back line's veins.
Antônio Carlos.one_liner_sports: Experienced Brazilian center back who anchors the defense when he's not seeing red.

fun_facts: Wears #3 — which is causing a jersey number conflict with new signing Sam Vines who wore #3 at Colorado
Franco Negri.one_liner_sports: Argentine defender added to bolster the back line this season.

fun_facts: Won the CONMEBOL Recopa 2024 before coming to Houston
Scored his first Dynamo goal in the 3-2 win over Portland (Mar 14)
Managed by @t.in.mo on Instagram
Felipe Andrade.tea: Scored his first goal as a Dynamo in that wild Portland match. The celebration was everything.
Felipe Andrade.one_liner_sports: Brazilian defender who popped up with a crucial goal vs Portland.

Reese Miller.one_liner_sports: Young American defender in the rotation.

Tomas Wiesner.one_liner_sports: Czech right-back. No public social media found yet.
Tomas Wiesner._gaps: No Instagram handle found. No partner info. Needs deeper research.

Sam Vines.partner_description: Wife — married Aug/Sep 2025. Wedding photographed by Jordan Imhoff Photography.
fun_facts: USMNT defender — 9 caps, 1 goal (scored in 2021 Gold Cup)
Colorado Springs native, Colorado Rapids academy product
Played 3 years at Royal Antwerp in Belgium — won the Belgian treble in 2023
Left-footed left-back
Contract through 2027
Jersey number TBD — #3 conflict with Negri
Sam Vines.tea: Newlywed alert! Sam and Andrianna tied the knot in late summer 2025, and now they're settling into Houston life. He's a USMNT defender who literally scored in the Gold Cup. The Inner Circle needs to find Andrianna's Instagram ASAP.
Sam Vines.one_liner_sports: USMNT left-back signed as a free agent. Won the Belgian treble at Royal Antwerp.
Sam Vines._gaps: Need Andrianna's Instagram handle. Need confirmed jersey number.

fun_facts: 6-foot-6 — absolute unit
First Seton Hall player selected in the MLS SuperDraft since Sacha Kljestan in 2006
BIG EAST Defensive Player of the Year at Seton Hall
Originally signed to Dynamo 2, promoted to first team March 20, 2026
Already earned first-team minutes vs LAFC and Portland on short-term loans
Contract through 2026 with club options through 2028-29
Agustin Resch.tea: This 6'6" Argentine came through the SuperDraft from Seton Hall and was SO good in his Dynamo 2 cameos that they promoted him to the first team after just three weeks. The first Pirate drafted since Kljestan? That's a flex.
Agustin Resch.one_liner_sports: Towering Argentine center back promoted from Dynamo 2 after impressive early performances.
Agustin Resch._gaps: Need Instagram handle. Need partner info. NEW SIGNING — needs full research pass.

Héctor Herrera.partner_description: Divorced from Shantal Mayo in 2025 (TUDN confirmed). Currently single as far as public sources show.
fun_facts: Two-time MLS All-Star with Houston
Captained the Dynamo to the 2023 U.S. Open Cup title
Returned to Houston after a season at Deportivo Toluca in Liga MX
Veteran Mexican international — previously at Porto and Atlético Madrid
Héctor Herrera.tea: The prodigal son returned. Herrera came BACK to Houston after a year in Mexico, and he's freshly divorced from Shantal Mayo (confirmed 2025). Single king era? The TikTok content has been 👀.
Héctor Herrera.one_liner_sports: Veteran Mexican international and former Dynamo captain. Provides leadership and experience in midfield.

Artur.partner_description: Wife. Verified via Dynamo sustainability video and Instagram.
Artur.one_liner_sports: Brazilian midfielder who controls the tempo in the middle of the park.
Artur.status_april_4: OUT — lower body injury (as of March 21 injury report). Return timeline unknown.

Diadié Samassékou.partner_description: Wife. Known as 'Mme Samassekou Anna' per Malian football content.
Diadié Samassékou.kids: At least one child (baby featured in TikTok content from Nov 2023).
fun_facts: Malian international
Featured in African Cup of Nations content while at Houston
Diadié Samassékou.tea: The Malian international and his wife Anna are couple goals in the West African football community — they've been featured on multiple football couples TikTok accounts.
Diadié Samassékou.one_liner_sports: Malian international midfielder — the engine room workhorse.
Diadié Samassékou._gaps: Need Anna's Instagram handle. Need more personal details.

Duane Holmes.partner_description: Wife (married June 2022). Her IG bio: 'Wife + Mama'.
Duane Holmes.kids: At least one child (per Brooke's 'Mama' bio).
Duane Holmes.one_liner_sports: Versatile midfielder who can play multiple positions across the midfield and attack.

fun_facts: Got a red card vs LAFC for fouling Son Heung-Min as last defender
Hit the crossbar from near midfield in the 47th minute of the LAFC match before the red — almost had a banger
Also fined for not leaving the field fast enough after his red
Agustín Bouzat.tea: Almost scored the goal of the season from midfield, then got sent off in the same match. The duality of Bouzat. Both he and Antônio Carlos fouled Son Heung-Min and got reds in the SAME game — Houston finished with 9 men.
Agustín Bouzat.one_liner_sports: Argentine midfielder formerly of Vélez Sársfield. Capable of brilliance and chaos in equal measure.

fun_facts: Youngest first-team signing in Houston Dynamo franchise history
Signed as a homegrown player from the Dynamo Academy
Only 15 years old
Matthew Arana.tea: Baby of the team alert! Matthew is literally 15 and already has a first-team contract. Youngest signing in franchise history. The Academy parents must be losing their minds.
Matthew Arana.one_liner_sports: 15-year-old homegrown prodigy — the youngest first-team signing in club history.

Mateusz Bogusz.partner_description: Wife, Pilates instructor, owns @no13.pilates. 24K IG followers. Based in Houston TX / Katowice, Poland.
Mateusz Bogusz.kids: Baby girl expected Feb 2026 — 'She's on her way' posted Jan 7. Last post (Mar 3) was captioned '02.2026 💝' still showing a pregnant belly. Baby has likely arrived but they're keeping it private for now.
fun_facts: Houston's most expensive signing ever — Designated Player from Cruz Azul (Mexico)
Former LAFC fan favorite — scored 18 goals in 2024
Polish international
Scored the 105th-minute winner vs Portland — second latest goal in MLS history
Wiktoria runs a Pilates studio and has 24K IG followers
Mateusz Bogusz.tea: The man scored in the 105TH MINUTE against Portland. Second latest goal in MLS history. His wife Wiktoria is a Pilates instructor with her own studio and 24K followers — she's been keeping the pregnancy private but the Inner Circle knows. New dad energy incoming.
Mateusz Bogusz.one_liner_sports: Houston's record signing and creative engine. Scores goals that make you question the laws of physics and time.

Guilherme.relationship_status: unknown — mentions 'family' in interviews but no partner publicly identified
Guilherme.partner_description: Unverified: Rebecca Vieira (@rebeccavieirax, 546K followers) shares his surname and is Brazilian, but connection NOT confirmed. DO NOT publish until verified.
fun_facts: Designated Player signed from Santos FC for ~$2M
Scored twice on his MLS debut vs Chicago (2-1 win)
Has a signature celebration called 'Passinho do Beloved' (Portuguese: Passinho do Amado) — a dance he brought from Santos
Neymar texted him after his hat trick saying 'you learned that from me' — they were teammates at Santos
4 goals and 3 assists in 4 matches — leading the team in both
Scored 3 goals in a 5-minute span to lead the comeback vs Dallas (assisted Sviatchenko and Ennali)
Nearly 100 professional goals across Brazil and the Middle East
Guilherme.tea: NEYMAR IS IN HIS DMs. After his hat trick, Neymar literally texted him saying 'you learned the hat trick from me.' They were teammates at Santos. Also has a signature celebration dance called the 'Passinho do Beloved' that he's bringing to Houston. 4 goals, 3 assists in 4 matches. This man is the main character of the 2026 season and it's not even close.
Guilherme.one_liner_sports: Brazilian Designated Player and early-season MVP candidate. 4 goals, 3 assists in 4 matches.
Guilherme._gaps: Partner verification needed. Rebecca Vieira (@rebeccavieirax) is a possible lead but unconfirmed.

Ezequiel Ponce.partner_description: Wife. Note: community feedback suggests current handle might be wrong — previous research found Martina Ponce Soto-Aguilar (@maartinaponce). Needs verification.
fun_facts: Wears the #10 shirt
Ezequiel Ponce._gaps: Partner handle needs verification — conflicting information between Martina Madeo and Martina Ponce Soto-Aguilar.

fun_facts: 19K Instagram followers
Featured in MLS Future Stars campaign
Key assist provider — set up Guilherme's first goal vs Chicago with a perfectly weighted through ball
Jack McGlynn.one_liner_sports: Young American midfielder with vision. The creative link in Houston's build-up play.
Jack McGlynn._gaps: No partner info found. Needs social media deep dive.

Nelson Quiñónes.partner_description: Previously had copy-paste error showing Bouzat's wife — CORRECTED to null.
fun_facts: Colombian winger with pace to burn
Nelson Quiñónes.one_liner_sports: Colombian speedster who can stretch defenses on the wing.
Nelson Quiñónes._gaps: No partner info. No fun facts. Needs full research pass.

Ondřej Lingr.one_liner_sports: Czech striker who provides a different option up front.

fun_facts: Scored the go-ahead goal in the Dallas match to make it 3-2 (before the collapse)
Preslee is a luxury makeup & hairstylist with her own TikTok artistry account
Lawrence Ennali.tea: Lawrence and Preslee are the content couple. She's a luxury makeup & hairstylist with her own artistry TikTok, and he's scoring bangers. The BCS post-match article specifically quoted Ennali after the Dallas loss.
Lawrence Ennali.one_liner_sports: German forward with pace and directness. Scored in the wild Texas Derby.

fun_facts: On loan for the 2026 season
Red card vs Portland for serious foul play — studs-up on goalkeeper James Pantemis, caused a gash and blood
Also fined for refusing to leave the field in a timely manner after the red
Received additional 1-match suspension from MLS Disciplinary Committee (2 matches total)
Nick Markanich.tea: This man got a red card for STUDS UP on the Portland goalkeeper, caused actual blood on the pitch, then wouldn't leave the field. Got fined AND an extra game ban. He's serving match 1 vs Dallas and match 2 vs Seattle. Chaos incarnate.
Nick Markanich.one_liner_sports: American forward on loan. Currently serving a 2-match suspension for serious foul play.
Nick Markanich.status_april_4: SUSPENDED — serving match 2 of 2-match ban (serious foul play vs Portland). Misses Seattle match.

fun_facts: Nigerian forward with TikTok presence
Aliyu Ibrahim.one_liner_sports: Nigerian forward providing depth in the attack.
Aliyu Ibrahim._gaps: No partner info. Needs full research pass.

_metadata.recent_form: Won 3 straight after opening loss to RSL. Beat Colorado 2-0, St. Louis 1-0 (away), San Jose 1-0 (away). Advanced in CONCACAF Champions Cup (beat Vancouver 5-1 on aggregate). Very strong defensively — 2 goals conceded in 4 MLS matches.
_metadata.key_absences: Danny Musovski may be limited (back injury from 2025). Obed Vargas transferred to Atlético Madrid. Playing 5 consecutive away matches while Lumen Field prepares for World Cup.
_metadata.tactical_notes: Strong defensive shape, clinical on the counter. Rusnák the creative hub. Five away matches in a row gives Houston a slight home advantage — Sounders haven't played at home since Feb 22.

players_to_watch.name: Cristian Roldan
players_to_watch.kids: Baby girl born July 2024. Announced April 2024.
fun_facts: Led Sounders with 14 assists across all competitions last season
Back in USMNT contention for the 2026 World Cup
Married Ciana Nicole in January 2023
His brother Alex Roldan also plays for the Sounders (right back)
players_to_watch.tea: Brother duo alert! Cristian AND Alex Roldan both play for Seattle. Cristian married Ciana in early 2023, and they welcomed a baby girl in July 2024. He's been the heartbeat of the Sounders for years and might make the US World Cup squad this summer. 62K followers on Instagram — the biggest Sounders personality.
players_to_watch.one_liner_sports: Sounders' midfield general and USMNT contender. 14 assists last season.

players_to_watch.name: Jordan Morris
players_to_watch.kids: Son Theo (born Oct 2023) and daughter Emilie Daly Morris (born Dec 7, 2025). His birth announcement post got 6,700+ likes.
fun_facts: All-time leading scorer in Sounders history (91 goals across all competitions)
Local kid — grew up in the Seattle area
Daughter Emilie born just 3 months ago (Dec 2025)
Coming back from injury-plagued 2025 (hamstring and shoulder)
players_to_watch.tea: Girl dad x2! Jordan and Eliza just welcomed baby Emilie in December 2025 — she's only 3 months old. His announcement post got almost 7K likes. He's the Sounders' all-time leading scorer AND a local Seattle kid. This is their equivalent of a franchise legend. The family content on his Instagram is *chef's kiss*.
players_to_watch.one_liner_sports: Sounders legend. All-time leading scorer. Bouncing back from an injury-plagued 2025.

players_to_watch.name: Albert Rusnák
fun_facts: One of the biggest free agent signings in MLS history (joined Sounders 2022)
Slovak international
4th player in Sounders history to reach 39 assists across all competitions
21 goals and 26 assists in league play over last 2 seasons
Helped Sounders win CONCACAF Champions Cup and Leagues Cup
Self-described 'quiet star' — lets his play do the talking
players_to_watch.tea: The 'quiet star' who's actually one of the best players in MLS. Albert and Tanicka have been together for years — they have a daughter Ariana (born 2017). Tanicka's been a Sounders family presence since their move from Real Salt Lake. He's won literally everything: Champions Cup, Leagues Cup. The resume is ridiculous.
players_to_watch.one_liner_sports: Slovak international and MLS assist machine. 21 goals and 26 assists in the last 2 regular seasons.

season_narrative.red_cards: 4 red cards in 4 matches (league leaders). Antônio Carlos + Bouzat vs LAFC (finished 9 men), Markanich vs Portland (serious foul play), Sviatchenko vs Dallas (2nd yellow).
season_narrative.vibe: Fun but flawed — Bayou City Soccer's headline says it all. This team is appointment television. 7-goal thrillers, 105th-minute winners, finishing matches with 9 men, a player who scores AND gets an own goal AND gets sent off in the same match. Charles is right: this is chaotic, passionate, and deeply entertaining.
season_narrative.guilherme_watch: 4 goals, 3 assists in 4 matches. The main character. Neymar is texting him. Has a signature dance. Brazilian Designated Player energy.
suspensions_april_4: Nick Markanich — match 2 of 2-game ban (serious foul play vs Portland)
Erik Sviatchenko — 1-match suspension (2nd yellow vs Dallas)
injuries_april_4: Artur — lower body (OUT since at least March 21)
Lucas Halter — lower body (OUT since at least March 21)

roster_changes_since_last_scan.detail: Promoted from Dynamo 2 to first team on March 20, 2026. 6'6" Argentine CB from Seton Hall. Contract through 2026 with club options through 2028-29. Already earned minutes vs LAFC and Portland.
Hired as Dynamo Academy General Manager on March 26, 2026.
